item.title: LEGO Icons Bouquet of Roses Artificial Flowers Set for Adults Botanical Collection Home or Office Décor Accessories Gifts for Women Men Her or Him Relaxing Activities 10328
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO Icons Bouquet of Roses Artificial Flowers Set for Adults Botanical Collection Home or Office Décor Accessories Gifts for Women Men Her or Him Relaxing Activities 10328 here: ℹ️: What’s in the box? – All you need to craft 12 artificial rose flowers with long green stems and 4 baby’s breath springs with small white LEGO flowers Buildable LEGO flowers home décor – Indulge yourself or join friends for a mindful project building the LEGO Icons roses bouquet set for adults Blooming buds – The LEGO Icons flower bouquet building set for adults depicts 4 artificial roses in full bloom, 4 blossoming and 4 in bud Christmas gift idea – Celebrate birthdays or surprise loved ones with LEGO flower bouquet for adult fans of LEGO building sets and home décor Roses bouquet – Are you looking for unique home accessories?

item.title: LEGO 10313 Icons Wildflower Bouquet Set Artificial Flowers with Poppies and Lavender Crafts for Adults Home Décor Gifts for Women Men Her & Him Botanical Collection
item.description: There’s a deal LEGO 10313 Icons Wildflower Bouquet Set Artificial Flowers with Poppies and Lavender Crafts for Adults Home Décor Gifts for Women Men Her & Him Botanical Collection here: ℹ️: Features 16 stems with a mix of flowers: cornflower, lavender, Welsh poppies, cow parsley, leatherleaf ferns, gerbera daisies, larkspur and lupins The wonderful artificial flowers will never wilt or need to be watered! Display in your own vase with pride as a stunning piece of home decor Put a creative spin on a timeless gesture with this LEGO flowers set, perfect as surprise gift for a loved one, anniversary present for wife or husband, or a nice housewarming present Part of the LEGO Botanical Collection, this set includes elements made of plant-based plastic, produced from sustainably sourced sugar cane Let your creativity blossom with the vibrant LEGO Icons Wildflower Bouquet set, which features 8 different stunning species of flowers to build Number of Pieces: 939 Budding flower arrangers can tailor the height of the flowers and experiment with different arrangements to make their own unique display 🛒 Buy it now!
